title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates:
Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates!
